title: CodeClient
description: A DiamondFire utility client for advanced coding.
body: [![license](https://img.shields.io/github/license/DFOnline/CodeClient?&color=850e05)](../LICENSE) [![build](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/DFOnline/CodeClient/build.yml?color=508f42)](https://github.com/DFOnline/CodeClient/releases/latest) A DiamondFire utility client for advanced coding. It is a fabric 1.20.* mod for coding more efficiently with utility features including but not limited to: * Phasing through codeblocks and code layers. * A palette of actions, events, and every value. * Automatically sending you to DiamondFire and even to a plot. * Showing you variable data live. ## LATEST RELEASE If you want the latest beta release, click on the top tab [here](https://github.com/DFOnline/CodeClient/releases) and use CodeClient-*.jar under **assets** ## Contributing Feel free to help! [Open an issue](https://github.com/DFOnline/CodeClient/issues/new) or submit PRs. ### Contributors Thanks to all the people who contribute.
